images.prompt:
Subject: A hyper-complex technical illustration of a human silhouette submerged in a saturated field of floating geometric nodes, fragmented schematic data, and recursive wireframes. The figure's chest holds a dense, solid gravitational core, serving as an anchor against the chaos.

Environment: The surrounding negative space is filled with an overwhelming, crowded network of potential trajectories, branching logic gates, and exploded-view mechanical details.

Style: Industrial futurism meets Swiss International Typographic Style. "Horror vacui" composition—extreme information density.

Technique: High-fidelity technical sketching, intricate mechanical layering, blueprint precision, distinct figure-ground separation despite the density.

Color Palette: Strictly Industrial Yellow #CA8F31 on Flat Black #000000.

Vibe: Intellectual saturation, orientation amidst abundance, schematic overload. No legible text.

[SUBJECT] Two overlapping neural silhouettes connected by a structured lattice of geometric language nodes and technical diagram lines

Foreground Color: #CA8F31 industrial yellow main color in foreground

Background: Flat black #000000

Positive Prompt:

Two overlapping neural silhouettes connected by a structured lattice of geometric language nodes and technical diagram lines, illustrated as a hyper-detailed technical sketch with dense linework, mechanical schematic motifs, and blueprint precision. Minimalist layout inspired by Swiss International Typographic Style and IBM ThinkPad aesthetics. Strong geometric structure, asymmetric composition, and industrial futurism. Strictly use color palette: industrial yellow #CA8F31 in foreground on flat black #000000 background. High contrast, figure-ground separation, negative space balanced with zones of extreme density. Crisp edges, poster-like composition. Remove all text.

Negative Prompt:

cartoon, anime softness, painterly brush strokes, watercolor, noisy clutter, gradients, excessive text, glossy 3d render, oversaturated colors
